    "Flange bolt-hole rotation is incorrect (two-holing missed), preventing proper alignment with mating equipment or piping."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut out or unbolt the misaligned flange.",
    "Re-align the flange to ensure bolt holes straddle the vertical/horizontal centerlines (two-hole method).",
    "Re-weld or re-fit the flange according to the project isometric drawings and ASME B31.3."
  ],
  "rationale": "The spool erection is roughed in but contains a critical alignment defect where the flange bolt holes were not properly rotated (two-holed). This prevents proper bolt-up and must be cut and re-fit before the spool can be accepted, limiting progress to 70% complete.",

    "Project isometric drawings"
  ]
